# kSecAttrService

**Global Variable**

A key whose value is a string indicating the item’s service.

## Declaration

```swift
let kSecAttrService: CFString
```

## Discussion

The corresponding value is a string of type [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/CoreFoundation/CFString] that represents the service associated with this item. Items of class [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/kSecClassGenericPassword] have this attribute.
title: kSecAttrService
